prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
This page contains the END of "Item 1C. Cybersecurity". The next section is "Item 2. Properties".
Transcribe VERBATIM the last 5 lines of "Item 1C" body text before the next item begins:
if the "Item 2" heading appears on this page, take the 5 lines just before it; otherwise Item 1C continues to the bottom, so take the last 5 lines of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
• Recent cyber risks and cybersecurity developments
• Cyber security threats
• Assessments by third-party experts
• Key cyber risk metrics
• Projects and initiatives
